confidence_comprehension_gap: No significant gap; patient demonstrated accurate metacognition by explicitly acknowledging confusion with technical details (BUN, electrolyte units) while correctly identifying their understanding of the global message (normal results) and clinical implications.

This resolved after the doctor's correction, with the patient accurately acknowledging the need for strict abstinence by the end.

By the end of the conversation, confidence and comprehension aligned appropriately, with the patient accurately understanding the distinction between urgent and non-urgent findings and connecting lifestyle factors to lab results.
